title: Last Holiday
desc: After learning of her terminal illness, Georgia quits her job and uses her savings to embark on a luxurious European trip, fulfilling her long-held desires.

title: Meet the Fockers
desc: Greg Focker and his fiancée Pam decide to make their respective parents meet before their wedding. However, the Fockers' relaxed attitude does not go down well with Pam's family.

title: Stuart Little
desc: Upon getting adopted by the Littles, Stuart, a mouse, is unwelcomed by his new brother George. So, when Stuart begins to feel low the family helps him find his real parents.

title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs 2
desc: When Flint learns that his machine is creating dangerous food-animal hybrids on Swallow Falls, he sets out with his friends to save his home. However, they soon realise that they have been deceived.

title: New Year's Eve
desc: Intertwining stories promise love, hope, forgiveness, second chances and more for a number of New Yorkers on the celebrated night. A rock star and his ex-lover clash at an exclusive party; a singer becomes stranded with a killjoy on the way to a New Year's gig; a nurse stays with a dying patient as he tries to hang on long enough to see the ball drop in Times Square one last time.

title: Carpool
desc: Daniel Miller has to take care of the carpool for his sons and the neighbourhood school children when his wife falls sick. However, in the course of the day, he finds himself a victim of a robbery.

title: A Dog's Way Home
desc: When Lucas sends his beloved dog, Bella, far away to safety, she begins an arduous journey across Colorado to be reunited with him.

title: A Dog's Way Home
desc: When Lucas sends his beloved dog, Bella, far away to safety, she begins an arduous journey across Colorado to be reunited with him.

title: 50 First Dates
desc: Henry falls in love with Lucy, whose short-term memory loss makes her forget him every time she falls asleep. As a result, Henry decides to win her over every day after she wakes up.

title: The Rewrite
desc: Keith Michaels, an Oscar-winning writer, teaches at the Binghamton University on the East Coast after losing his popularity in Hollywood and falls in love with Holly, a fellow teacher.

title: The Love Laugh Live Show
desc: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives.

title: The Love Laugh Live Show
desc: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives.

title: The Love Laugh Live Show
desc: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives.

title: Just Go With It
desc: A successful plastic surgeon attempts to win over a young match teacher by convincing his secretary to pose as his soon-to-be ex-wife.

title: Monster-in-Law
desc: After several failed blind dates, a woman finally finds the man of her dreams, but his mother goes to great lengths to ruin their relationship.

title: Fun With Dick and Jane
desc: When Dick's employer goes bankrupt, he and his wife, Jane, go broke and look for ways to make ends meet. Eventually, they resort to crime and decide to rob a crooked CEO to get their money back.

title: Sex and the City 2
desc: Carrie, Miranda and Charlotte are tired of dealing with the pressures of life and desire a break. Thus, they join their friend, Samantha, in Abu Dhabi, where her former partner is filming a movie.

title: Eat Pray Love
desc: Elizabeth Gilbert's perfect world comes shattering down when she gets divorced. She then embarks on a journey across the world in an attempt to rediscover her true self.

title: Instant Family
desc: Pete and Ellie Wagner, a couple, decide to adopt three siblings Lizzie, Juan and Lita. But trouble knocks at their door when the children's troublesome birth mother is back in the frame.

title: The Bounty Hunter
desc: Milo is hired to track down his ex-wife, Nicole, for skipping bail. Subsequently, a routine retrieval turns into a deadly game of cat and mouse, forcing them both to go on the run together.

title: Bad Teacher
desc: With the intention of getting a breast implant, Elizabeth becomes a high school substitute teacher. However, when she learns about a bountiful bonus, she strives to get her students the highest marks.

title: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
desc: After FBI agent Malcolm Turner's stepson, Trent, witnesses a murder, the two are forced to go undercover. While Malcolm turns into Big Momma, Trent disguises himself as Charmaine.

title: Crazy Rich Asians
desc: A professor's world turns upside down when she discovers that her longtime boyfriend belongs to an eccentric, super rich family of business moguls.

title: DC League of Super-Pets
desc: Superman and his super-dog Krypto share the same power and fight crime together. However, when Superman gets kidnapped, Krypto trains harder to rescue him.
